title: Amazon Basics 18-Piece Dinnerware Set, Service for 6, White
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: AB-grade porcelain; BPA-free; lightweight yet durable
Elegant white finish to complement existing kitchen décor
Safe in your microwave, oven, and freezer. Suitable for dishwasher
Includes 6 each: 26.5 cm dinner plate, 19 cm dessert plate, 14 x 7 cm bowl
Plates can withstand a maximum temperature of 300 degrees and a minimum of -15 degrees (Celsius)

Porcelain dinnerware is fragile, easy to break, please do not try to overlap directly when you place them, to avoid mutual friction of porcelain surface damage. Handle with care to avoid hitting hard objects. If damaged or broken, please dispose of them carefully
description: From the manufacturer Amazon Basics 18-Piece Dinnerware Set Bring an elegant sense of contemporary style to the kitchen, dining room, or even the breakfast nook with this everyday Amazon Basics dinnerware set. A nice choice for family meals and casual gatherings, the 18-piece collection includes 6 place settings, each with a 26.5 cm dinner plate, 19 cm dessert plate, 14 x 7 cm soup/salad bowl. High-Quality Porcelain for Everyday Use Made of AB-grade porcelain, the high-quality dinnerware set offers reliable strength and durability, as well as a lightweight design for easy handling. The porcelain dinnerware set is also BPA-free, so there's no need to worry about BPA seeping into food or beverages like with some plastic dishes and containers. The porcelain dinnerware set can be safely used in the freezer, microwave, and oven, though be careful, as the plates will get hot. The dinnerware set can withstand a maximum temperature of 300 degrees and a minimum of -15 degrees (Celsius) What's more, the everyday 18-piece dinnerware set can go in the dishwasher, making clean-up a snap. Contemporary Style The dinnerware set's gleaming-white porcelain features notable black trim along the edge with one or two thinner matching inset rings for enhanced visual appeal. The sleek modern design tastefully layers together and makes a nice addition to existing dinnerware pieces, table linen, and surrounding decor. The Amazon Basics 18-piece round dinnerware set ships in frustration-free packaging, and there are no annoying stickers on the back to try to remove. Simply rinse clean and the dinnerware set is ready to use. Amazon Basics Product Amazon Basics offers everyday items for your home, office, garden and more. With a selection that continues to grow, the Amazon Basics brand is set to become a part of your daily convenience for electronics products and lifestyle.
